name: baghdad-shop-monorepo
description: Baghdad Shop - A full-stack e-commerce ecosystem with React 19 Frontend and Node.js REST API Backend.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "SERVER,CLIENT" -c "magenta,blue" "npm run server --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:express: concurrently -n "EXPRESS,CLIENT" -c "green,blue" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix client && npm run lint --prefix server
scripts.check-types: npm run check-types --prefix client && npm run check-types --prefix server

author: Hossam Gezo <ha2ghossam10@gmail.com> (https://github.com/HossamGezo)
